cell_legend.rule: Every cell must be pass, or waived with a reason that cites a GOAL.md amendment. Artifacts are repo-relative paths and must exist.

cells.l0_template: golden byte-equal vs transformers (5 cases) + EOS/BOS from generation_config + render-failure hard error
cells.l1_bf16: BF16 greedy byte-equal vs HF transformers, N>=20 prompts (reference_match mechanism)
cells.l2_gguf_metal: GGUF known-answer smoke N>=10 on Metal, semantic answers correct
cells.l2_gptq_cuda: GPTQ-Marlin known-answer smoke N>=10 on CUDA, semantic answers correct
cells.l3_behavior: blast-radius chat/server suites green with this alias (multi-turn KV, stream==non-stream, natural EOS, stop sequences, reasoning extraction)
cells.l4_agent: server_agent_tools + server_structured_output: required tool-call 10/10, strict json_schema 20/20, temp 0
cells.l5_concurrency: bench-serve random 256/128 c=1/4/16 (+c=32 for 30B-class), 100% completion zero errors
cells.perf_same_arch: throughput within 10% of same-architecture gated sibling, same card/quant/concurrency
cells.docs_readme: README support-matrix row + alias + template/EOS provenance + release gate cell

l1_bf16.reason: GOAL amendment #1 (2026-06-12): Qwen3-MoE path has no BF16-feasible config (60GB > 48GB dual-4090); same-path M3/Qwen3-30B-A3B carries deep historical validation, and L2 runs semantically at real size

l2_gguf_metal.note: extended smoke 10/10: known-answer 10/10 semantic-correct on Metal GGUF Q4_K_M; XML tool-call format parses to OpenAI tool_calls (required 10/10); strict schema 10/10

l3_behavior.note: GOAL amendment #2: smoke L3 section green — multi-turn KV, stream==non-stream, natural EOS, custom stop (finish+no-leak), max_tokens cutoff

l4_agent.note: amendment #2 harness: required tools 10/10 (XML format) + strict schema 20/20 (final-script rerun)

l5_concurrency.note: Metal c=1/4/16/32, n=3: completed 100/100 every run, zero errors, stddev <1% (no consecutive-repeat degradation); out-tok/s 37.5/35.4/56.8/57.1. CUDA-side L5 joins the pod batch

l0_template.note: golden 5/5 incl. reasoning-history strip; renamed EOS 151643 resolved from tokenizer_config (commit 21e89645)

Same-architecture Metal proof stands via Qwen3-14B / R1-8B passes; 32B verification moves wholly to the CUDA GPTQ lane

models.name: Mistral Small 3.2 / Magistral Small (24B line; Devstral 2 demoted, see own entry)

l0_template.note: golden 15/15 across the line (strftime_now date-pinned, commit c8f3703e); Magistral fixture alongside

l1_bf16.reason: GOAL amendment #1 (2026-06-12): 24B BF16 (48GB) exceeds single-4090; dense-path representative covers the shared code, Mistral-specific quirks (tokenizer/prefix remap) are exercised by L0 goldens + L2 at real size. Upgradeable to dual-4090 BF16 if the pod session has slack

models.name: Devstral Small 2 24B (DEMOTED to W2-tail per GOAL stuck-rule, 2026-06-12)

l1_bf16.reason: Demoted: GGUF arch is mistral3 (YaRN factor 48 over 8192 + attention temperature scale 0.1, all under the mistral3.* namespace). ferrum's llama-family GGUF path cannot represent it; smoke produced degenerate output (3/10 known-answers, repetition loops). Loader now hard-errors on unsupported arches instead of garbling. Implementing mistral3 = new rope/attention math, beyond the W1 SMALL estimate — revisit at W2-tail with Gemma 3's heterogeneous-attention groundwork

l2_gptq_cuda.reason: No Marlin-clean GPTQ exists (UNVERIFIED #4) and the arch is unsupported regardless

docs_readme.note: README must list Devstral 2 as NOT supported (mistral3) — explicit non-support beats silent garbage

models.name: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B (dual-GPU)
models.lane_note: GGUF decoding is NOT wired into the CUDA engine (explicit loader error; GGUF serving is Metal-only today). Lane pivoted to OPEA/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B-int4-gptq-sym-inc (verified Marlin-clean: 4bit/g128/sym/desc_act=false, 80 layers) — matches the llama33-70b lane's GPTQ format plan. README must document GGUF=Metal / GPTQ=CUDA lane split

l0_template.note: template byte-identical to R1-Distill-Qwen-32B fixture (sha 56a1447ad31926fd, same EOS, verified 2026-06-12); only the per-model EOS-from-config assertion remains, runs with the dual-GPU lane

l1_bf16.reason: GOAL amendment #1 (2026-06-12): 70B BF16 140GB exceeds any available configuration; GOAL.md plans GGUF 4bit on the llama33-70b-4bit-2x4090 lane

l2_gguf_metal.reason: 70B exceeds 32GB Mac; lane is dual-4090 layer-split (l2 runs there)
l2_gguf_metal.note: dual-GPU known-answer smoke replaces this cell

l2_gptq_dual_gpu.note: dual-4090 layer-split serve: known-answer 10/10, natural EOS, reasoning extracted, no think leak — 10 checks green (pod gates_70b_smoke_final.log). This lane also flushed out and verified the prompt-opened-think streaming fix (stream==non-stream now green)

l3_behavior.note: amendment #2: multi-turn, stream identity (post-fix), EOS, stop mechanics, max_tokens — all green on dual-GPU

l4_agent.reason: Distill-family model behavior: the tools-unaware template + prompt-forced think makes the model write the tool-call JSON inside its (never-closed) think block (server correctly 400s required tool_choice; reasoning_len=3052 starting with the JSON). Engine mechanics are correct — R1-0528-8B (no forced think) passes tools 10/10. README marks the distill rows chat/reasoning-grade, not agent-grade

l5_concurrency.note: c=1/4/16 dual-4090 bench running on Iceland
